horoscope: Your sense of personal purpose can strengthen through the support and backing of someone important to you, dear Aries. The opportunity might emerge to further understand yourself, others, and your situation. Someone or a group may be your emotional anchor now. Mercury transits can bring a missing piece of a puzzle, informationally speaking, that aids decision-making and overall clarity. It’s a good idea to listen intently and be honest with yourself. You could make a surprising connection or experience deeper feelings towards someone now. There can be especially creative ideas for long-term plans and strategies. You can, in fact, work out something with a friend or solve a nagging problem.

Today's transits help you find the perfect project or pursuit to pour your energies into, dear Taurus, and you feel more directed. It’s a time to gain valuable insight into what to eliminate in your life to help you move forward. Fortunately, you have more conviction about your ideas and perceptions right now. Information coming in can be helpful and possibly purging and healing. It’s a good time to communicate your ideas persuasively or research a matter a little more thoroughly. Influences today help you slow down and see the value of strategy. It's a time for checking your work or editing, and you may very well enjoy a break in this way. Instincts are strong that a change is either imminent or necessary, and you'd prefer to be the one in control of this. You could be considering ways to change your image on a professional level.

With today's Mercury transits, you see the value of coming to conclusions slowly or going at life more deliberately and calmly, dear Gemini. Something previously hidden might emerge now, and it's enlightening! Others trust you with confidential information. Communications, especially with friends, are deep and rewarding. This energy might instead play out with your own thoughts and musings, which are taking you to exciting places. It's a fine time to discover new layers of a situation or engage in an especially eye-opening discussion. Nurturing a long-term goal or plan, thinking in large terms, and feeling a stronger sense of purpose, possibly through a learning program or connection, can be themes. There is more intensity in your relationships today, and this can be a creative, positive energy.

With Mercury's transits today, you use your resources intelligently, dear Cancer. You could see private matters on a whole new level, possibly finding an opening where you thought there was a dead end. It’s a good time for developing strategies, making plans, and digging deeply into a matter to learn more about it. It’s all about the details today! They’re not only interesting but also valuable. It can be a time to uncover important facts that you overlooked in the past. You’re more aware of and intrigued by uncharted territories. Energies are strong for zeroing in on problem areas, which can point to making significant headway with projects and even close relationships. They're also good for financial planning and goal-making. There is a tendency to stay or operate in the background, but you retain a lot of power in this position. In fact, your observational skills are tremendous now.

With today's Mercury transits dear Leo, you're in the right frame of mind for setting goals, rules, and limits, as well as for gaining new insights into special people in your life. Conversations can be very enlightening, particularly those that address philosophical concerns and the future. You have a little more courage to face and acknowledge the truth, and you're ready to embrace it. You're focused on what's substantial, and you have far less concern about the extras, making it an excellent time for meaningful work. You can be really feeling your attachments in both positive and negative ways, but also a day when a solution to problem areas can be in sight. You may even see that the challenges you face with others lead to getting in touch with your own potential.

Getting organized and learning new things can be in focus and successful today, dear Virgo. If you tune into the genius of today’s Mercury transits, you’re likely to see a new layer to a situation and feel better off for it. Efforts toward achieving your health and fitness goals prosper, as can investigations or research. Significant conversations can occur and help clarify a matter or focus on setting goals for the future. The key seems to be patience! You can feel more passionately about health and wellness programs, and you may find many reasons to love life right now. Much of this revolves around a desire to explore or research it more deeply, to rid yourself of negative habits, and to attend to and transform your health.

The Moon spends the day in your solar eighth house, dear Libra, and you're ready to sink your teeth into something substantial. With today's Mercury aspects, you're feeling gently motivated to improve your life, and it feels quite good. You can be quite determined to dig a little more deeply into a topic. It may very well be a strong time for romantic matters or relationships with children. You benefit from shared activities or conversations about a long-standing issue. It's also a good time for creative projects, recreation, and hobbies, for which you are exceptionally motivated and focused. Collaboration is highly favored today. You might decide to get your affairs into order or set goals on romantic and creative matters. Self-honesty is important now, and you might experience a moment of truth, as well as motivation to kick a bad habit and to live a freer, more joyful life as a result.

Working on your home, health, or personal life can be on your mind right now, dear Scorpio, and this may involve getting rid of things you no longer need. Fortunately, it's easier than usual to see what can go in the name of progress with today's Mercury transits. You can also feel especially motivated to work hard to boost your family, home, or comfort levels, as well as your ability to recreate your home living environment. On another level, you may be working on an emotional problem and identifying which attitudes or preoccupations are holding you back from getting over an obstacle. It's a great day for getting organized and for looking deeply within at your attachments to make important changes, grow, and improve.

The day's energies are good for really making progress on a project you feel passionately about, dear Sagittarius, or for anything that requires persuasion. Being persistent can be good, but being insistent may be too much. Fortunately, you seem to instinctively know where to draw the line right now. You are not afraid of getting into uncomfortable territory, and you’re willing to put in extra effort where it’s due. It’s a great time to gain an advantage on the level of the mind, primarily as you now see what has been in your way! You’re in an excellent position to get your message across and win a receptive audience if you desire. Communication and learning endeavors are likely more successful right now.

With today's Mercury transits, you can have enlightening thoughts, conversations, or musings, especially with or about loved ones, dear Capricorn. It's a time to boost your home life with a practical improvement or item that makes your life just a little better. You are insightful about your money situation and exceptionally resourceful. You're also ready to read between the lines, uncover hidden truths, and get to the heart of a problem. It's a powerful time to envision ways to make the best or the most of a situation. You're strongly motivated to find ways to develop your talents, business, and resources — you're willing, ready, and interested. You could be motivated to improve due to an initially uncomfortable situation, such as a feeling of jealousy or a sense of lack. Use today for developing strategies that will benefit you in the long term.

Feelings can be intense and passionate, and this can motivate you to make changes today, dear Aquarius. A good conversation or bit of news can be part of this. While you may be getting along quite fine with others today, you may find the most satisfaction from setting your own pace. Today's Mercury transits help establish a deliberate, comfortable pace. Conversations can lead you into deep waters. The information you receive might open you up to new ways of looking at things, and in a most positive way! You are open to changing your habits if it means making improvements. You may get the chance to clarify yourself to someone, which feels good. It's also a fine time to take the lead with your ideas and plans.

With today's Mercury transits, you can feel a strong desire to sort things out, get organized, and take care of business, dear Pisces. You're gaining a clear sense of what you need to change, get rid of, or adjust to move forward. You're itching to get to the truth or heart of a situation, and as a result, you may not have much patience for frivolous or superficial conversations for now. It's an excellent time to make plans, develop strategies or schedules, and research or investigate your options. These energies are about building up your mental strength and a patient, positive mindset. There may be some intensity, perhaps revolving around a secret or private matter, and strong energy for solving problems. A financial boost or good idea can also be in the spotlight today.
